policy.source: manual inspection of restaurant1-4 sampled frames
policy.notes: Use this as visual evidence only. DB/tool facts are still obtained from RestaurantDB.

orientation_notes.restaurant3.mp4: menu is rotated in the camera view; normalize by menu text reading orientation

left_fold_top.visual_description: top white rounded box on the left fold/page

left_fold_middle.visual_description: middle white rounded box on the left fold/page

left_fold_bottom.visual_description: bottom white rounded box on the left fold/page

middle_fold_top.visual_description: top white section on the middle fold/page

middle_fold_right_border_hand.visual_description: middle fold section with a small hand illustration on the right border

middle_fold_lower_left_title_hand.visual_description: lower-middle middle fold section whose title has a small hand illustration on the left

right_fold_top.visual_description: top white section on the right fold/page

right_fold_left_border_hand.visual_description: right fold vertical/side section with a small hand illustration on the left border

right_fold_dark_background.visual_description: right fold dark green background section with white title/text

bottom_right_supplement.visual_description: small supplementary homemade bread section in the bottom-right corner

restaurant1.mp4.sequence_notes: Frames F004-F012 point within the left fold; F020-F024 point near the middle fold; later frames show the right fold more clearly. Exact pointed dish/category must be checked per task because several tasks refer to dish-level order.

category_sequence.notes: Finger points at the top-left Cold Cuts card.
Finger points at the top-right Pizza card; nearby frame F014 is clearest.
Finger is near the lower-middle Italian Pasta section.

restaurant3.mp4.sequence_notes: Camera view is rotated. Frames F003-F013 point repeatedly in the left-column menu area. Use full-resolution frames and normalize menu orientation before deriving first/second/last pointed dish or category.

raw_salmon.visual_description: center plate with orange salmon slices, onion garnish, and lemon wedge

panini.visual_description: right-side wooden plate with grilled panini/sandwich pieces

melon_and_ham.visual_description: back-center plate with melon and ham/prosciutto-like slices beside greens

small_left_dessert.visual_description: small left plate with a cake or bread-like piece; not enough evidence for a unique DB name without instruction context
